results.title: Delhi launches Green SM electric taxi service with 1,000 vehicles
results.description: Delhi introduces Green SM electric taxi service with 1,000 vehicles, focusing on women's safety and plans to expand to 10,000 in the Delhi-NCR region.

results.title: CBI prepares to seek custody of D-118 gang ‘chief’ in Rath murder probe
results.description: Investigators regard Gyanendra Singh alias ‘Mannu’ as a crucial figure in the case because of his alleged criminal background and influence across multiple states
